hudson.tasks.BatchFile.command:
set BUILD_ID=dontKillMe @echo off set /A Counter=0 setlocal ENABLEDELAYEDEXPANSION echo y| C:\"Program Files"\PuTTY\plink -no-antispoof -i "D:\PPK\Astro_Go.ppk" ec2-user@%Master_IP% rm -r /home/ec2-user/PayTV/ echo y| C:\"Program Files"\PuTTY\pscp -P 22 -i "D:\PPK\Astro_Go.ppk" -r D:\AstroPayTV\PayTV ec2-user@%Master_IP%:/home/ec2-user for /f "tokens=*" %%a in (D:\slaveIps\slave.txt) do ( echo line=%%a set /A Counter=Counter+1 echo Counter After Increment: !Counter!
echo y| C:\"Program Files"\PuTTY\plink -no-antispoof -i "D:\PPK\Astro_Go.ppk" ec2-user@%%a ls
echo y| C:\"Program Files"\PuTTY\plink -no-antispoof -i "D:\PPK\Astro_Go.ppk" ec2-user@%%a rm -r /home/ec2-user/PayTV/ echo y| C:\"Program Files"\PuTTY\pscp -P 22 -i "D:\PPK\Astro_Go.ppk" -r D:\AstroPayTV\PayTV ec2-user@%%a:/home/ec2-user echo y| C:\"Program Files"\PuTTY\pscp -P 22 -i "D:\PPK\Astro_Go.ppk" -r D:\AstroPayTV\DataFile1\token_device_!Counter!.csv ec2-user@%%a:/home/ec2-user/PayTV/token_device.csv echo y| C:\"Program Files"\PuTTY\pscp -P 22 -i "D:\PPK\Astro_Go.ppk" -r D:\AstroPayTV\DataFile2\contentIds_!Counter!.csv ec2-user@%%a:/home/ec2-user/PayTV/contentIds.csv echo y| C:\"Program Files"\PuTTY\pscp -P 22 -i "D:\PPK\Astro_Go.ppk" -r D:\AstroPayTV\DataFile3\Series_Ids_!Counter!.csv ec2-user@%%a:/home/ec2-user/PayTV/Series_Ids.csv echo y| C:\"Program Files"\PuTTY\pscp -P 22 -i "D:\PPK\Astro_Go.ppk" -r D:\AstroPayTV\PayTV\scenarios\fav.py ec2-user@%%a:/home/ec2-user/PayTV/scenarios/fav.py echo y| C:\"Program Files"\PuTTY\pscp -P 22 -i "D:\PPK\Astro_Go.ppk" -r D:\AstroPayTV\PayTV\scenarios\content.py ec2-user@%%a:/home/ec2-user/PayTV/scenarios/continueWatch.py echo y| C:\"Program Files"\PuTTY\pscp -P 22 -i "D:\PPK\Astro_Go.ppk" -r D:\AstroPayTV\PayTV\runner\user-journey-login-csv.py ec2-user@%%a:/home/ec2-user/PayTV/runner/user-journey-login-csv.py
set privateIPs=!privateIPs!%%a, set privateIPs=!privateIPs:~0! START C:\"Program Files"\PuTTY\plink -no-antispoof -i "D:\PPK\Astro_Go.ppk" ec2-user@%%a "cd /home/ec2-user/PayTV/ && locust -f runner/user-journey-login-csv.py --worker --master-host=%Master_IP% --processes 4" )

set BUILD_ID=dontKillMe @echo off setlocal ENABLEDELAYEDEXPANSION echo %Master_IP% echo y| C:\"Program Files"\PuTTY\plink -no-antispoof -i "D:\PPK\Astro_Go.ppk" ec2-user@%Master_IP% "cd /home/ec2-user/PayTV/ && locust -f runner/user-journey-login-csv.py --master --headless -u %Users% -r %RampUp% --run-time %Duration% --html /home/ec2-user/PayTV/reports/result.html"
